title: Update app icon and enhance patient card demographics

requirements.text: Add a new cartoon-style app icon depicting the heads of a dog and cat, store it as generated static assets under frontend/public/assets/generated, and update the app to use it for browser/app icons (e.g., favicon).

quotes: Change the app icon to a cartoon head of a dog and cat

acceptanceCriteria: New icon image files exist under frontend/public/assets/generated with the exact filenames specified in imageRequirements.required.
frontend/index.html references the new icon(s) so the browser tab/favicon updates accordingly.
After redeploy, the browser favicon reflects the new dog+cat cartoon head icon.

requirements.text: Update the patient card UI (surgery case card) so the Arrival date is displayed in the top-right corner of the card header area instead of in the demographics grid.

quotes: move the arrival date to the top right corner of the patient card

acceptanceCriteria: In frontend/src/components/cases/CaseCard.tsx, the Arrival date no longer appears in the demographics grid section.
The Arrival date is visible at the top-right of the card header area (aligned to the right within the header region) for each case card.
The Arrival date remains formatted consistently with the existing date formatting (MM/DD/YYYY).

requirements.text: Add an Age field to the patient card (surgery case card) that calculates the pet’s age from the stored Date of Birth and displays it in years and months.

quotes: add a field to the patient card where the Age of the pet is calculated in years and months

acceptanceCriteria: If a valid DOB exists, the patient card shows an "Age:" row/value in the demographics section with a human-readable value like "2y 3m" (years and months).
If DOB is missing/invalid, the Age field is not shown (or shows a clear placeholder such as an empty string) and no runtime errors occur.
Age calculation uses the current date and does not display negative values (future DOBs should result in a safe non-negative display or suppressed field).

required: Cartoon icon of a dog and cat heads, clean vector-like style, transparent background (app-icon-dog-cat.dim_512x512.png)
Cartoon icon of a dog and cat heads, clean vector-like style, transparent background (app-icon-dog-cat.dim_192x192.png)
Cartoon icon of a dog and cat heads, clean vector-like style, transparent background (app-icon-dog-cat.dim_32x32.png)
